nasb.text: With his finger he shall sprinkle some of the blood on it seven times and cleanse it, and from the impurities of the sons of Israel consecrate it.

esv.text: And he shall sprinkle some of the blood on it with his finger seven times, and cleanse it and consecrate it from the uncleannesses of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 又用指頭向祭壇彈血七次，潔淨祭壇，使它分別為聖，脫離以色列人的不潔。

ccb.text: 用手指向祭坛洒血七次，除掉以色列人的污秽，使祭坛圣洁。
